Video.summary: It's a Moparween at Graveyard Carz! Just when things couldn't get crazier, Bill Goldberg shows up to go over his '68 GTX Convertible and knock some sense into the guys. He can handle the NFL and the WCW, but can he hold his own at GYC?
Video.title: It's the Great Pumpkin, Goldberg!

Video.summary: Mark is behind on his promise to get Tom Partidge's '69 Daytona Charger finished by the end of the month. The crew kicks into high gear to get Tom's Daytona looking great and out the door.
Video.title: Daytona Reborn Pt. 1

Video.summary: Mark is behind on his promise to get Tom Partridge's '69 Daytona Charger finished by the end of the month. The crew bands together to do whatever is necessary to fulfill Mark's promise to the owner and bring it back to life.
Video.title: Daytona Reborn Pt. 2

Video.summary: A 1970 Dodge Charger engine is restored in this Special episode.
Video.title: The Elephant in the Room

Video.summary: A rare 1970 Charger and a 1970 Barracuda 383 are featured.
Video.title: Daren and Royal Go Topless

Video.summary: A 1968 Charger, a 1970 Challenger R/T, and a 1969 Charger are featured.
Video.title: General Disassemble Lee

Video.summary: A 1972 Dodge Charger is restored.
Video.title: Mo Money Mo Challengers

Video.summary: A 1969 Road Runner is featured.
Video.title: Drive a Mile in My Shoes

Image.alt: Drive a Mile in My Shoes
Drive a Mile in My Shoes
Drive a Mile in My Shoes

Video.summary: Work on a 1972 Dodge Charger is continued.
Video.title: Top Banana Charge

Video.summary: The story about the 1972 Charger is briefly revisited, and past work leading to its completion is also revisited. Work on the 1972 Dodge Charger is completed and revealed to the owners.
Video.title: Gone Bananas

Video.summary: A friend of Kevin and Willie has not one, but two work trucks that need improvements for hauling heavy loads. Can the guys handle this double-order and finish both trucks in time for the owner to get them back on the job?
Video.title: Double Truck Trouble

Video.summary: If you’re headed for the formidable Moab Desert, your Jeep had better be ready for anything. Willie and Kevin are outfitting a Wrangler TJ and a Cherokee XJ to handle the harsh environment of the desert.
Video.title: Moab Ready

Video.summary: Kevin hits the road to Bolingbrook, Illinois to find out what it takes to proudly display “Made in America”, as he tours WeatherTech to see how they make all those great American products.
Video.title: WeatherTech Bound

Video.summary: The guys have a Mini Cooper S in the shop today. They add some horsepower, some stopping power, and fix up a worn-out suspension to improve handling. Then they see if they can even fit in it for the test drive!
Video.title: Can’t Stop This Mini

Video.summary: Kevin and Willie have a problematic Trailblazer in the shop today. They tackle multiple issues and get it up and runnin’ again. The guys also kick start a performance build project on a Gen5 Camaro!
Video.title: Get It Runnin’

Video.summary: The guys have a 6 Speed 2015 Mustang GT in the shop and they’re adding some power by installing a cold air intake, an exhaust package, a tune, and a … thermostat?
Video.title: Tuned Up Stang’

Video.summary: Kevin and Willie are working on a build again, but this time it’s no work truck! They’re diving in head first on a 550 Horsepower Cobra Replica Kit Car!
Video.title: Cobra Replica Kit Car Build

Video.summary: Kevin and Willie have a Gen 1 Camaro in the shop and their work is cut out for them! They’re installing a new sub frame, rack and pinion, brakes, gauges … and that’s just half of the work!
Video.title: Fun With A Gen 1 - Part 1

Video.summary: The Gen 1 Camaro is back in the shop and the guys still have a lot to do if they want to finish this build!
Video.title: More Fun With A Gen 1 - Part 2

Image.alt: More Fun With A Gen 1 - Part 2
More Fun With A Gen 1 - Part 2
More Fun With A Gen 1 - Part 2

Video.summary: Drivers start your engines! This week, Kevin takes a trip to racing country. We’re giving you a backstage look at WeatherTech’s Porsche Race Team and their North Carolina racing facility.
Video.title: WeatherTech Racing – N.C. Facility

Video.summary: The guys install a stiffer suspension on this Mustang to help get it ready for power adders and they toss on a new exhaust to sweeten its sound.
Video.title: Dang’ Mustang

Video.summary: Willie and Kevin freshen up a rough looking Chevy Blazer with paint and a new front fascia. They also fix a starting issue and get it running right again.
Video.title: Beat up Blazer

Video.summary: The guys take a Jeep from meh, to mean - when they install a new long arm suspension kit to get this Jeep Wrangler Unlimited ready for the trails.
Video.title: Wrangler Ready

Video.summary: This 2010 Camaro will soon be churning out close to 1000 Horsepower, so Kevin and Willie get it ready to handle that power by installing a new Ford 9 inch, new rear axle shafts, and a new drive shaft.
Video.title: Righteous Rear End

Video.summary: Kevin and Willie have two BMWs in the shop today, an M3 and a 528i. One is the weekend driver in need of a little more power, and the other is the family car that needs some maintenance after throwing a few codes.
Video.title: Two BMWs

Video.summary: The guys help this 2017 Ford Super Duty with a 5th wheel, see its loads better by adding a second rear camera. They also give it a little more get up and go with a performance tune.
Video.title: Super Duty Hauler

Video.summary: The Jeep Build-Off continues as the guys get a chance to finish their Jeeps and take them on a Geocaching race for all of the marbles.
Video.title: Jeep Build-Off Day 4

Video.summary: The Jeep Build-Off continues as the guys get a chance to finish their Jeeps and take them on a Geocaching race for all of the marbles.
Video.title: Jeep Build-Off Day 5

Video.summary: What UTV should you buy? Should it be a Can Am Commander or a Razor RZR? Matt and Bruno show you what kind of upgrades you can do to each of them, and then they have some fun on the trails!
Video.title: Commander vs Razor

Video.summary: Matt and Bruno show you what a car dealership is going to look for when your truck hits a 100-thousand miles to determine its trade in value. Matt and Bruno show you what kind of repairs you can do yourself to get the most value on your truck.
Video.title: Shop Misinformation

Video.summary: The gloves are off….so is the exhaust, DPF, and anything else that makes our diesel track truck street legal. Today a King Ranch is getting ready for a date with the drag strip.
Video.title: Diesel Track Truck

Video.summary: A final wish list from a customer gets completed on a 1985 C-10 project truck, and we cure a slipping transmission problem on a Dodge.
Video.title: Wish List Project

Video.summary: When your work truck gets wrecked, your ability to work stops. Matt and Bruno take on a project to get a work truck back on the road with some body work and repair.
Video.title: Wrecked

Video.summary: Matt and Bruno ‘s Jeep project is going to be a beast when they get finished with it. The guys install a supercharger and a long arm suspension to give it some life, and they finish it up with a new exhaust and a mean front bumper that will provide the “bite.” Then, the beast is unleashed!
Video.title: Jeep Beast

Video.summary: Matt and Bruno do some custom fabrication to a build stage CJ 7. They also run new fuel lines and drop in a new fuel tank.
Video.title: Build Stage CJ

Video.summary: A lot can wrong in a Diesel trucks fuel delivery system. Today we look at corrosion in the lines and stuck injectors, to see if we can solve the problems with a secret.
Video.title: Fuel Delivery System

Video.summary: We love bolt on power, so today is going to be fun. We've got a Roush Supercharger kit, with an exhaust and intake to install on this stock 2012 F150. Then we’ll put it on the road and burn some rubber.
Video.title: Roush Truck

Video.summary: Matt and Bruno take a stock TJ and make it into the machine it was born to be. Once we upgrade the Steering and Suspension, we’ll make some much needed repair.
Video.title: TJ Off-Road Upgrade

Video.summary: The Ghoulz pay tribute to their favorite moments over the previous seasons. This special episode looks back over seasons 1-3 of Graveyard Carz, but includes all new interviews to highlight some previously unrevealed details.
Video.title: Episode 1
